mapper.select: SELECT FROM check_ins WHERE habitId = #{habitId} ORDER BY checkDate DESC
SELECT FROM check_ins WHERE userId = #{userId} ORDER BY checkDate DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO check_ins (habitId, userId, checkDate) VALUES (#{habitId}, #{userId}, #{checkDate})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM check_ins WHERE habitId = #{habitId} AND checkDate = #{checkDate}
mapper.select: SELECT checkDate FROM check_ins WHERE habitId = #{habitId} ORDER BY checkDate DESC
